name: Honey Nougat
recipeInstructions:
1. Toast hazelnuts in a moderate oven on an oven tray for 10 minutes.
2. While the nuts are warm, rub off skins using a clean tea towel.
3. Place sugar and water in a small saucepan. Stir over low heat until the sugar is dissolved.
4. Cook the syrup without stirring until it reaches 140 degrees C when tested with a sweets thermometer or until it reaches the soft crack stage.
5. Stir honey into the syrup and return to a boil until the temperature is 140 degrees when tested with a sweets thermometer or until it reaches the soft crack stage.
6. Beat egg white until stiff peaks form. Continue to beat the egg white while adding the hot syrup in a thin stream.
7. Beat the mixture constantly until it thickens and becomes stiff. Fold through hazelnuts.
8. Pour into a lightly greased 18 cm square pan. Allow to cool and set overnight.
9. Cut into bars using a wet knife. Wrap each piece of nougat in cellophane; refrigerate until required.
Makes about 20.
